steps: "Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567",
"Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty entitles Norwegian residents to 15% WHT rate, not the 13.5% applied",
"Reference CRA Part XIII tax rates confirming 15% is the correct treaty rate for Canadian dividends to Norwegian residents",
"If RBC disputes, escalate with formal claim citing treaty documentation and custodian error in applying incorrect rate"

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
Skatteetaten – Reduced WHT on Dividends for Foreign Shareholders
